text:
Montblanc Toto (モンブラン＝トト, Monburan Toto) is a member of the Heil-Ly Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 

Appearance

Montblanc is a young girl with rosy cheeks and a small nose. She uses a dark-colored fabric to tie her fair hair into pigtails, which hang down to her neck.

Personality

Montblanc seemed nervous in her initial appearance as she blushed when having to kiss Morena, but she is cheerful and easygoing as she works with Chiffon to dispose of corpses for the family. Like her fellow Heil-Ly members, she seems to have sadistic tendencies and no qualms about killing people. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Gathered together with Morena and the 22 other Heil-Ly members, Montblanc appears nervous yet excited. Morena tells them that she will bestow an ability upon them as promised, telling them to come up one at a time. Montblanc is the first to walk up, and Morena holds her arms before quickly kissing her on the lips. Morena then explains how her Nen ability works and wishes the members good luck. 

After Bille kills Tassi, Terebellum carries his corpse to a large laundry room in the Heil-Ly's hideout. He calls out to Montblanc that the corpse is the last one and adds that Voconte connected the room to processing. She asks Chiffon for help, and she quickly stops hanging up clothes and agrees to help. Terebellum tells them that they will all reach level 21 soon, pointing out that it's almost time for them to level up. As Montblanc smiles and holds a large blade in her hand, Chiffon begins to remove Tassi's clothes and happily looks forward to leveling up. It's then stated that Montblanc Toto (level 3) is a Conjurer, cleaner, and involved in feed manufacturing. Chiffon Toto (level 6) is also a Conjurer and skilled in sewing and arts and crafts. 

When Hinrigh and Nobunaga infiltrate the Heil-Ly's hideout, Montblanc and Chiffon can be seen sitting together at the main table with several other members. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 399 

Abilities and Powers

Nen

Montblanc is a Conjurer. Having reached level 3 with Morena's Nen ability, Montblanc's aura amount and output have been increased. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Montblanc shares a name with the Mont Blanc dessert, in line with the pattern of the female members of the Heil-Ly Family (Cashew, Chiffon Toto, Gelato, and Soufflé) being named after desserts, with the exception of its leader, Morena.
Montblanc and Chiffon have the same surname, but it is currently unconfirmed if (or how) they are related. Given their close relationship, they are most likely sisters.
